entities.name: LALATORA, MADHYA PRADESH, INDIA
entities.description: The specific geographic location in India where the on-farm studies were conducted

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: A productive group of soils found in Lalatora that face constraints to high agricultural productivity

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall output of agricultural land, which is limited by several constraints in the study area

entities.name: LOW CROPPING INTENSITY
entities.description: A major constraint identified as limiting high agricultural productivity

entities.name: WATERLOGGING
entities.description: A condition occurring during the rainy season that acts as a constraint to agricultural productivity

entities.name: MODERN TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Advanced agricultural tools and practices that farmers were unable to use

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: An improved crop variety whose use significantly increased crop productivity and farmer income

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: An improved crop variety whose use significantly increased crop productivity and farmer income

entities.name: WATER HARVESTING
entities.description: An improved method of water resource management used to increase crop productivity and income

entities.name: NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A method of soil fertility management, including micronutrient application, used to increase productivity

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential nutrients whose application is part of the nutrient management strategy

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A method of pest control used to significantly increase crop productivity and farmer income

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield, which was improved through the use of improved varieties and management practices

entities.name: FARM INCOME
entities.description: The financial earnings of farmers, which increased due to improved crop productivity and management practices
